# Agent Safety And Sandboxing

This synthesis page uses Claim Cards to track rollback, isolation, capability governance, safe execution, threat, and safeguard evidence for agent harnesses.

## Gaps And Recheck Notes

- Claim Cards marked `volatile` need official-source recheck before policy or procurement use.
- `agent-drafted` and `agent-reviewed` cards are not human-reviewed; use `human-reviewed` only when a named human reviewer is recorded.
- Gap cards identify weak local extraction or insufficient claim-level evidence.
